title: Laser irradiation method, laser irradiation device, laser marking device, and fabricating apparatus
abstract: A laser irradiation method includes causing a first deflector to deflect a laser beam, causing a second deflector to raster-scan an object with the laser beam deflected by the first deflector, the object having an irradiation region and a non-irradiation region separated from the irradiation region, and causing the first deflector to deflect the laser beam, which is moved to the non-irradiation region by the second deflector, to the irradiation region to irradiate the irradiation region with the laser beam.
claims:
Claims [CLAIMS] [Claim 1] A laser irradiation method comprising: causing a first deflector to deflect a laser beam; causing a second deflector to raster-scan an object with the laser beam deflected by the first deflector, the object having an irradiation region and a non-irradiation region separated from the irradiation region; and causing the first deflector to deflect the laser beam, which is moved to the non-irradiation region by the second deflector, to the irradiation region to irradiate the irradiation region with the laser beam. [Claim 2] The laser irradiation method according to claim 1 , wherein the causing the second deflector to raster-scan the object with the laser beam in a main scanning direction; and the causing the first deflector to deflect the laser beam in a sub-scanning direction intersecting the main scanning direction to irradiate the irradiation region separated from the non-irradiation region in the sub-scanning direction. [Claim 3] The laser irradiation method according to claim 1 , wherein the first deflector includes an acousto-optic deflector or an electro-optic deflector. [Claim 4] The laser irradiation method according to claim 1 , wherein the causing the first deflector to deflect the laser beam in a sub-scanning direction orthogonal to a main scanning direction raster- scanned by the second deflector. [Claim 5] The laser irradiation method according to claim 1, further comprising: causing the first deflector to deflect the laser beam in a first direction; causing a third deflector to deflect the laser beam, deflected by the first deflector in the first direction, in a second direction different from the first direction; and causing the second deflector to raster-scan the object with the laser beam deflected by the third deflector. [Claim 6] The laser irradiation method according to claim 1 , wherein a raster-scan line interval is determined based on an irradiation density of a laser irradiation region per reference area in the object. [Claim 7] A laser marking method comprising: causing a first deflector to deflect a laser beam in a first direction; 

causing a second deflector to raster-scan an object with the laser beam deflected by the first deflector at a scanning speed, the object having an irradiation region and a non-irradiation region separated from the irradiation region; and causing the first deflector to deflect the laser beam, which is moved to the non-irradiation region by the second deflector, to the irradiation region to irradiate the irradiation region with the laser beam when the second deflector accelerates or decelerates the scanning speed. [Claim 8] The laser marking method according to claim 7, further comprising: deflecting the laser beam deflected by the first deflector in a first direction in a second direction different from the first direction by a third deflector between the first deflector and the second deflector. [Claim 9] A laser irradiation device comprising: a first deflector to deflect a laser beam; and a second deflector to raster-scan an object, having an irradiation region and a non-irradiation region separated from the non-irradiation region, with the laser beam deflected by the first deflector, wherein the first deflector deflects the laser beam, which is moved to the non-irradiation region by the second deflector, to the irradiation region to irradiate the irradiation region with the laser beam. [Claim 10] The laser irradiation device according to claim 9, wherein the second deflector raster-scans the object with the laser beam in a main scanning direction, and the first deflector deflects the laser beam in a sub- scanning direction intersecting the main scanning direction to irradiate the irradiation region separated from the non-irradiation region in the sub-scanning direction. [Claim 11] The laser irradiation device according to claim 9, wherein the first deflector includes an acousto-optic deflector or an electro-optic deflector. [Claim 12] The laser irradiation device according to claim 9, wherein the first deflector deflects a laser beam in a sub- scanning direction orthogonal to a main scanning direction raster-scanned by the second deflector. [Claim 13] The laser irradiation device according to claim 9, further comprising a third deflector disposed between the first deflector and the second deflector, wherein the first deflector deflects the laser beam in a first direction, and the third deflector deflects the laser beam, which is deflected by the first deflector, in a second direction different from the first direction. [Claim 14] A laser marking device comprising: a first deflector to deflect a laser beam; and a second deflector to raster-scan an object having an irradiation region and a non-irradiation region separated from the irradiation region at a scanning speed, wherein the first deflector deflects the laser beam, which is moved to the irradiation region or the non-irradiation region by the second deflector, to the irradiation region to irradiate the irradiation region with the laser beam when the second deflector accelerates or decelerates the scanning speed. [Claim 15] The laser marking device according to claim 14, further comprising a third deflector disposed between the first deflector and the second deflector, wherein the third deflector deflects a laser beam deflected by the first deflector in a first direction in a second direction different from the first direction. [Claim 16] The laser irradiation device according to claim 9, wherein a first deflection angle of a laser beam deflected by the first deflector at a predetermined coordinate of a p-th raster-scanning in a raster- scanning direction is different form a second deflection angle of the laser beam deflected by the first deflector at a predetermined coordinate of a (p+q)-th raster- scanning in the raster-scanning direction, where p and q are any integers. [Claim 17] A fabricating apparatus comprising: the laser irradiation device according to claim 9 to irradiate a powder layer with a laser beam to fabricate a fabricated layer; and a control unit to control the laser irradiation device to repeatedly fabricate the fabricated layer to fabricate a three-dimensional article.
